title: MISTING STATIONS - 211info
text: SHERIDAN CITY PARK MISTING STATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Misting stations provide sprayed water in an outdoor space to help individuals cool down in hot temperatures. 601 NE Yamhill Street Sheridan, OR 97378 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week from dawn to dusk Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHERIDAN CITY PARK
